name: Instant Pot Lentil and Vegetable Curry
description: A fast, deeply spiced lentil curry loaded with anti-inflammatory turmeric, ginger, and colorful vegetables — ready in under 40 minutes with the Instant Pot.
recipeIngredient: 1 can coconut milk (14 oz, full fat)
1 large sweet potato, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions: Sauté the aromatics: Set the Instant Pot to Sauté mode. Heat olive oil, add onion, and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Add garlic, ginger, turmeric, cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne. Stir for 1 minute until fragrant. Press Cancel.
Add the base: Add rinsed lentils, diced tomatoes, coconut milk, vegetable broth, sweet potato, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.

Pressure cook: Lock the lid, set the valve to Sealing, and cook on Manual/Pressure Cook (High) for 10 minutes. When done, let the pressure release naturally for 10 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Finish: Open the lid, stir in baby spinach and lemon juice. Let sit 5 minutes until spinach wilts. Taste and adjust salt.
Serve over quinoa, topped with fresh parsley.
